description: Plugin-distributed hooks for platform-engineering-idp. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags platform-as-a-product anti-patterns (mandate language, ticket-driven self-service, unowned catalog entity, vanity metric). Set PLATFORM_IDP_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
